content.text:
<user_query>
Explore the frontend website pages and components to understand what currently exists. Look at these specific files and report their content/purpose:

1. List all files in `frontend/src/pages/website/` 
2. Read `frontend/src/pages/website/IntegrationsPage.js` - what does it contain?
3. Read `frontend/src/pages/website/TrustLandingPage.js` - what does it contain?
4. Look for any existing Soundboard page in `frontend/src/pages/` 
5. Look for any existing Platform page  
6. Check `frontend/src/App.js` for all route definitions related to website pages (lines with `/platform`, `/intelligence`, `/soundboard`, `/integrations`)
7. Check `frontend/src/components/website/SoundboardFlagshipStage.js` - full content

Return: file listing, route paths found, and full content of SoundboardFlagshipStage.js
</user_query>
Let me explore the frontend codebase to answer these questions. I'll run multiple searches in parallel.

Now let me also grab the full route list context around the website pages section in App.js:

I have all the information needed. Let me also check if there's a website-specific Soundboard page (not the app page) in the routes.

Here is a complete summary of everything found: --- ## 1. Files in `frontend/src/pages/website/` ``` frontend/src/pages/website/ ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ HomePage.js ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ IntelligencePage.js ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ IntegrationsPage.js ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ PlatformPage.js ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ PricingPage.js ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ TrustLandingPage.js ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ TrustSubPages.js ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ platform/ ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ AlertsPage.js ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ AutomationsPage.js ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ ExecOverview.js ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ IntegrationsPlatform.js ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ PlatformLogin.js ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ RevenueModule.js ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ industries/ ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ AgencyView.js ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ ConsultingView.js ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ ConstructionView.js ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ IndustryComponents.js ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ MSPView.js ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ SaaSView.js ``` Total: **19 files** (6 top-level pages + 13 in `platform/`) --- ## 2. `IntegrationsPage.js` ‚Äî Purpose & Content A **public marketing page** at route `/our-integrations` that showcases BIQc's integration catalogue. Key sections: - **Hero** ‚Äî Headline "500+ Integrations", orange CTA button ("Connect Now"), link to `/trust` - **Filter chips + grid** ‚Äî Category filters (All, Email, CRM, Accounting, HR & Payroll, ATS, File Storage). Each chip has an `` tooltip explaining read-only access scope. Renders `IntegrationCard` components from `ALL_INTEGRATIONS` array (22 live integrations: Gmail, Outlook, HubSpot, Salesforce, Xero, QuickBooks, BambooHR, Deel, Greenhouse, Google Drive, Notion, etc.) - **Coming Soon section** ‚Äî 4 cards (Meta Ads, LinkedIn Ads, Google Ads, Intercom) shown in "all" view only - **Custom API callout** ‚Äî 4 tiles: Open API, Webhooks, CSV Import, Custom Sync - **Secure & Unified section** ‚Äî 3 trust cards (AES-256, Australian Data Residency, Revoke Anytime) - **CTA** ‚Äî "Start Free ‚Äî Connect Now" linking to `/register-supabase?source=integrations-page` Uses a `Logo` component fetching logos from Clearbit with a dark fallback. All integration cards link to `/register-supabase?integration=`. --- ## 3. `TrustLandingPage.js` ‚Äî Purpose & Content A **public trust/security marketing page** at route `/trust`. Sections: - **Hero** ‚Äî "Built for Businesses That Take Data Seriously." with orange accent, subtitle about Australian sovereign hosting - **Australian Sovereign Hosting** ‚Äî Two-column layout with checklist (Sydney data centres, Privacy Act 1988 compliance, sub-processor transparency) and a decorative Shield globe graphic - **Security Infrastructure** ‚Äî 4-card grid: Encryption at Rest (AES-256), Encryption in Transit (TLS 1.3), Access Controls (RBAC, MFA), Audit Logs - **Legal & Governance** ‚Äî 5 clickable rows linking to sub-pages: - `/trust/terms` ‚Äî Terms & Conditions - `/trust/privacy` ‚Äî Privacy Policy - `/trust/dpa` ‚Äî Data Processing Agreement - `/trust/security` ‚Äî Security & Infrastructure - `/trust/centre` ‚Äî Trust Centre --- ## 4. Soundboard Page(s) Found **No dedicated website/marketing Soundboard page** exists in `frontend/src/pages/website/`. What exists is: - **`frontend/src/pages/MySoundBoard.js`** ‚Äî The full **authenticated app page** for the Soundboard feature, mounted at the protected route `/soundboard`. It is a large ~1290-line component featuring a full chat interface with BoardroomCouncilCard, VoiceChat, file attachments, conversation sidebar, and layout persistence. There is no public-facing `/soundboard` website marketing page analogous to `PlatformPage.js` or `IntelligencePage.js`. --- ## 5. Platform Page **`frontend/src/pages/website/PlatformPage.js`** exists and is mounted at the public route `/platform` (as `SitePlatformPage`). The `platform/` subdirectory also contains interactive demo/showcase pages (ExecOverview, RevenueModule, AlertsPage, AutomationsPage, IntegrationsPlatform, and 5 industry views). --- ## 6. Route Definitions in `App.js` ‚Äî Website Pages **Public website routes:** | Route | Component | |---|---| | `/` | `SiteHomePage` | | `/platform` | `SitePlatformPage` | | `/intelligence` | `SiteIntelligencePage` | | `/our-integrations` | `SiteIntegrationsPage` | | `/pricing` | `Pricing` | | `/trust` | `SiteTrustLandingPage` | **Platform demo routes:** | Route | Component | |---|---| | `/platform/login` | `PlatformLogin` | | `/platform/overview` | `ExecOverview` | | `/platform/revenue` | `RevenueModule` | | `/platform/alerts` | `AlertsPage` | | `/platform/automations` | `AutomationsPage` | | `/platform/integrations-demo` | `IntegrationsPlatform` | | `/platform/industry/msp` | `MSPView` | | `/platform/industry/construction` | `ConstructionView` | | `/platform/industry/consulting` | `ConsultingView` | | `/platform/industry/agency` | `AgencyView` | | `/platform/industry/saas` | `SaaSView` | **Protected app routes:** | Route | Component | |---|---| | `/soundboard` | `MySoundBoard` (behind `ProtectedRoute`) | | `/integrations` | `Integrations` (behind `ProtectedRoute`) | | `/intelligence-baseline` | `IntelligenceBaseline` (behind `ProtectedRoute` + `LaunchRoute`) | Note: there is **no `/soundboard` public website marketing route** ‚Äî only the protected app route. The integrations marketing page uses `/our-integrations`, not `/integrations` (which is the protected in-app integrations manager). --- ## 7. `SoundboardFlagshipStage.js` ‚Äî Full Content This is a **pure presentational/marketing UI component** (130 lines) used to demo the Soundboard feature on the website. It renders an animated mock "boardroom session" widget: ```1:130:frontend/src/components/website/SoundboardFlagshipStage.js import React from 'react'; import { Activity, ArrowRight, BarChart3, Briefcase, MessageSquare, Radio } from 'lucide-react'; import { fontFamily } from '../../design-system/tokens'; const checks = [ { id: 'ceo', label: 'CEO', detail: 'Checking strategic priorities', icon: Briefcase }, { id: 'finance', label: 'Finance Manager', detail: 'Scanning margin and cash pressure', icon: BarChart3 }, { id: 'marketing', label: 'Marketing Manager', detail: 'Scanning competitor threats', icon: Activity }, ]; const SoundboardFlagshipStage = () => (
// ... (animations, left-panel role cards, right-panel chat bubble, "Boardroom Mode" badge)
); export default SoundboardFlagshipStage; ``` **Structure:** - **CSS animations** ‚Äî `sbSweep` (orange light sweep across the card), `sbPulse` (staggered pulsing on role cards), `sbTyping` (animated dots) - **Left panel** ‚Äî 3 role cards (CEO, Finance Manager, Marketing Manager), each with icon, label, and a status detail, pulsing with staggered delays via `sb-role` CSS class - **Right panel** ‚Äî A mock chat exchange: - User bubble: *"Our competitor just cut pricing by 12%. Should we respond this week?"* - "Boardroom Mode" badge with arrow - AI response bubble: *"Hold headline price, launch a targeted retention offer, and defend margin while monitoring competitor churn."* + animated typing dots ("drafting...") - Colors use the orange `#C65F2E` / `#FF6A00` brand palette and blue-grey `#5B8FA8` accent
